title: La croisière jaune
actors: Georges-Marie Haardt, Louis Audoin Dubreuil, André Citroën
plot: The film tells the expedition, led by Georges Marie Haardt and Louis Audouin-Dubreuil and sponsored by André Citoën, leaving Beirut in Lebanon to rally China through the ancient Silk Road with half-tracks vehicles, between 1931 an...
